message:
fix(extensions): fix clippy lints, test assertions, and veto_count semantics in safety envelope

- Add const fn annotations to OcoTunerState methods (missing_const_for_fn)
- Use mul_add for gradient updates (suboptimal_flops)
- Allow cast_sign_loss in adaptive_overload_threshold
- Use map_or_else instead of map_or for lazy default (or_fun_call)
- Fix PAC-Bayes test: no-data bound should be 1.0 (worst case), not 0.0
- Fix budget_controller_regime_shift_disabled test: disable safety_envelope too
- Fix veto_count to only increment on activation transitions, not every evaluate()
- Fix DeoptReason serde roundtrip test: use from_value to avoid &'static str lifetime issue
- Include concurrent agent changes (BRAVO controller, hostcall_trace_jit module)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
